chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-55 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case 15-12-2023 Mr. Gul Mir Jatoi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. Mr. Bilal Ahmed Soomro, Advocate files power on behalf of respondents No.2&3. ***** It is urged that counter-case arising out of Crime No.26 of 2022, registered at P.S, Tamachani under sections 302 PPC etc. is pending before 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Sukkur. Therefore, in order to avoid conflicting judgments, Sessions case No.106 of 2023 re: State- Versus Karim Bux alias Akash & others, pending before 5th Additional Sessions Judge, Sukkur may be transferred to the same Court. Learned counsel for respondents No.2&3 and learned APG have recorded no objection. Accordingly, this application is allowed and Sessions case No.106 of 2023 re: State- Versus Karim Bux alias Akash & others, arising out of crime No.48 of 2022 of P.S, Tamachani, under sections 395 PPC etc. pending before the Court of learned 5th Additional Sessions Judge, Sukkur is hereby withdrawn and transferred to the Court of 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Sukkur with direction to expedite both the matters and dispose of in accordance with law. JUDGE Ahmad
